title: Released - Templates for email & activities to be store by teams
excerpt: Have the Templates for email & activities to be store by teams, right now they are user base, but it will be nice to use them across different teams.

posts.author: ofuks001 (Omara Fuks)
posts.cookedHtml: Have the Templates for email & activities to be store by teams, right now they are user base, but it will be nice to use them across different teams.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ofuks001!

Thank you for that request.

I will pass it to our R&D team so it can be considered

Cheers,
-Matias

posts.author: mactoph (Christopher Phillips)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for this idea @ofuks001 - we would love to see this feature as well, or email templates per board would be great as well.

posts.author: mkeffeler (Miclain Keffeler)
posts.cookedHtml: Totally agree. It’s very abnormal for individual users to be the only one with templates, except in one person companies.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all!

Thank you for the feedback!

Your votes have been added to this request

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Request monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done

posts.author: Olga (Olga)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey everyone! I have really good news for you! Check out this update

posts.author: Michael-PT (Michael Albers)
posts.cookedHtml: I think sharing Emails & Activities templates should be a core feature, not only for CRM. Especially for smaller companies, who do not need complete CRM/sales funnels, these templates should be available for all seats. (3 in our case, although we only need 2).
